Class Skill

java.lang.Object
Skill
Direct Known Subclasses:
AdrenalineRush_Skill, DreamSlash_Skill, Omnislash_Skill, Parry_Skill
public abstract class Skill extends Object
Class file for the abstract Skill class

This is a bonus abstract class for special skills to be used by the bonus EnchantedWeapon class.

Weapon skills or active abilities are a special action a entity can take during their turn.

Weapon skills range from powerful attacks to buffing the weapon holder.

These skills have an activation condition that needs to be met before becoming available to use.

See Also:
  • EnchantedWeapon

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract void
    activateSkill(Entity entity, Entity target)
    Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, activates the skill Skill activation can happen any amount of turns after it has been made available to use
    abstract void
    checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity entity, Entity target)
    Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, checks if the skill's activation condition/s have been met
    abstract void
    createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity entity, Entity target)
    Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, generates the text to be displayed when the skill is used
    abstract void
    deactivateSkill(Entity entity, Entity target)
    Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, deactivates the skill Skill deactivation happens either right after a skill is used or it has elapsed its active turn time
    String
    getActiveSkillResultDescription()
    Getter method to return the skill's result description
    int
    getConditionCounter()
    Getter method to return the current condition count of the skill
    boolean
    getHasMetConditions()
    Getter method to indicate whether a skill is available to use or not
    boolean
    getIsMultipleTurns()
    Getter method to return whether a skill's effects are active or not
    int
    getRequiredConditionCounter()
    Getter method to return the required condition count of the skill
    String
    getskillConditionDescription()
    Getter method to return the skill's condition description
    String
    getskillDescription()
    Getter method to return the skill's description
    boolean
    getTurnsActive()
    Getter method to return whether a skill's effects are active or not
    int
    getTurnsLeft()
    Getter method to return the remaining amount of turns a skill's effects will remain active
    void
    setActiveSkillResultDescription(String description)
    Setter method to set the text to be displayed when the skill is activated.
    void
    setConditionCounter(int conditionCounter)
    Setter method to set the conditionCount of the skill.
    void
    setHasMetConditions(boolean condition)
    Setter method to indicate the state of the weapon's skill activation.
    void
    setIsMultipleTurns(boolean isMultipleTurns)
    Setter method to set whether the skill lasts for multiple turns or not.
    void
    setRequiredConditionCounter(int conditionCounter)
    Setter method to set the RequiredConditionCount of the skill.
    void
    setTurnsActive(boolean turnsActive)
    Setter method to indicate if the skill is active or not This is assumed false and must be changed to otherwise in the activateSkill method.
    void
    setTurnsLeft(int turnsLeft)
    Setter method to set the amount of turns left where a skill's effects remain active

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Skill

      public Skill(String skillDescription, String skillConditionDescription)
      Constructor for the Skill class
      Parameters:
      skillDescription - string detailing a brief description of the skill
      skillConditionDescription - string detailing a brief description of the activation requirements of a skill

  • Method Details

    • setHasMetConditions

      public void setHasMetConditions(boolean condition)
      Setter method to indicate the state of the weapon's skill activation.
      Parameters:
      condition - boolean to set the skill activation to either true or false

    • setConditionCounter

      public void setConditionCounter(int conditionCounter)
      Setter method to set the conditionCount of the skill. A skill's condition count is a counter for actions like turns or attacks.
      Parameters:
      conditionCounter - amount to set the conditionCounter

    • setRequiredConditionCounter

      public void setRequiredConditionCounter(int conditionCounter)
      Setter method to set the RequiredConditionCount of the skill. A skill's required condition count is the value the condition count must reach before a skill becomes available to use.
      Parameters:
      conditionCounter - value condition count must reach

    • setActiveSkillResultDescription

      public void setActiveSkillResultDescription(String description)
      Setter method to set the text to be displayed when the skill is activated.
      Parameters:
      description - text to be displayed upon the skill's activation.

    • setIsMultipleTurns

      public void setIsMultipleTurns(boolean isMultipleTurns)
      Setter method to set whether the skill lasts for multiple turns or not. This is assumed false and must be changed to otherwise in the subclass's constructor.
      Parameters:
      isMultipleTurns - boolean to indicate whether a skill's effect will last for multiple terms.

    • setTurnsActive

      public void setTurnsActive(boolean turnsActive)
      Setter method to indicate if the skill is active or not This is assumed false and must be changed to otherwise in the activateSkill method.
      Parameters:
      turnsActive - boolean to indicate whether a skill's effect is active or not

    • setTurnsLeft

      public void setTurnsLeft(int turnsLeft)
      Setter method to set the amount of turns left where a skill's effects remain active
      Parameters:
      turnsLeft - amount of turns left where a skill's effects remain active

    • getHasMetConditions

      public boolean getHasMetConditions()
      Getter method to indicate whether a skill is available to use or not
      Returns:
      boolean on whether the skill can be used or not

    • getConditionCounter

      public int getConditionCounter()
      Getter method to return the current condition count of the skill
      Returns:
      condition count value

    • getRequiredConditionCounter

      public int getRequiredConditionCounter()
      Getter method to return the required condition count of the skill
      Returns:
      required condition count value

    • getskillDescription

      public String getskillDescription()
      Getter method to return the skill's description
      Returns:
      skill description

    • getskillConditionDescription

      public String getskillConditionDescription()
      Getter method to return the skill's condition description
      Returns:
      skill condition description

    • getActiveSkillResultDescription

      public String getActiveSkillResultDescription()
      Getter method to return the skill's result description
      Returns:
      skill result description

    • getIsMultipleTurns

      public boolean getIsMultipleTurns()
      Getter method to return whether a skill's effects are active or not
      Returns:
      boolean on whether a skill's effects are currently active or not

    • getTurnsActive

      public boolean getTurnsActive()
      Getter method to return whether a skill's effects are active or not
      Returns:
      boolean on whether a skill's effects are currently active or not

    • getTurnsLeft

      public int getTurnsLeft()
      Getter method to return the remaining amount of turns a skill's effects will remain active
      Returns:
      turns a skill's effect will remain active

    • createActiveSkillResultDescription

      public abstract void createActiveSkillResultDescription(Entity entity, Entity target)
      Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, generates the text to be displayed when the skill is used
      Parameters:
      entity - entity object that has the skill equipped
      target - entity object that is the target of the skill

    • checkSkillConditionCounter

      public abstract void checkSkillConditionCounter(Entity entity, Entity target)
      Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, checks if the skill's activation condition/s have been met
      Parameters:
      entity - entity object that has the skill equipped
      target - entity object that is the target of the skill

    • activateSkill

      public abstract void activateSkill(Entity entity, Entity target)
      Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, activates the skill Skill activation can happen any amount of turns after it has been made available to use
      Parameters:
      entity - entity object using the skill
      target - entity object that is the target of the skill

    • deactivateSkill

      public abstract void deactivateSkill(Entity entity, Entity target)
      Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses, deactivates the skill Skill deactivation happens either right after a skill is used or it has elapsed its active turn time
      Parameters:
      entity - entity object using the skill
      target - entity object that is the target of the skill
